item.title: Bottom shelf memes I found in the kidney bean shaped pond
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
For more memes check out discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax Follow twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka to be notified when she goes live
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Phone clearing dump
item.description:
Do you go shulrp or mlem mlem mlem?
Reminds me of Logolas somehow..
Relax its just jokes... I said to myself
I try not to bother them and then jump on me
Holy Hand Grenade Fireball
Ooh these memes are from that time...
That all seems a lifetime ago and just yesterday at the same time
I like it when people include the source in the memes I steal
Our Penis
This needs to be added in a game
Is this still true?
This is still true.
=D
JUMP FOR JOY just like the pixels
Weeeeeeee
Ooof
Heh Front page edit: I'm proud of you degenerates :')
item.dc:creator: Rock2142

item.dc:creator: Necridos

item.title: Face Eating Leopards Begin Their Feast
item.description:
Yes, for all those that thought that Trump's toxic policies would only affect, well, everyone else here is the beginning of the reality check. Unless you are ultra-wealthy yep, you're going to be impacted and not in ways that you're going to find pleasant. I present to you item one. This his been on list for a while now and while this is only related to the expansion bill, bi-partisan and broadly popular, that was all but passed until election night by the way. Republicans were so excited to start axing programs they broke protocol the Freedom Caucus led a seven minute pro forma session to 'lay the bill on the table'. In all fairness it's not actually dead but I firmly believe that is the reality. https://www.newsweek.com/republicans-break-protocol-kill-social-security-benefits-expansion-bill-1982423 https://rollcall.com/2024/11/05/social-security-bill-bottled-up-after-election-night-maneuver/
Already a Trump appointed Judge has struck down an immigration program for spouses of U.S. citizens. All of you not naturally born U.S. citizens who voted for TFG must be at least a little concerned at this point, right? https://www.cbsnews.com/news/judge-declares-biden-immigration-program-for-spouses-of-u-s-citizens-illegal/
Okay, so not directly related to TFG but more a statement as to the a subset of the population in general. And no, this isn't a United States specific issue, it's mostly global. But.... with the re-election of TFG this is now a de-facto acceptable way to act, at least in America. Honestly, I have no idea why anyone who isn't a hetero cis gendered white male would vote for TFG but here we are. https://www.nbcnews.com/news/nbcblk/black-people-text-messages-picking-cotton-nearest-plantation-rcna179036
Oooh, here's a good one! And this isn't going to be just a United States problem either. I bet Putin creamed himself when the election was called. For anyone who thinks this isn't going to have global ramifications well, you're an idiot. https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/world/2024/11/08/putin-trump-election-victory/76125177007/
Ah, yes, good ole' musky literally bought himself a president. Get ready for greatly reduced regulation on his space and terrestrial activities. And when you auntie gets run over by a shitty self driving Tesla that doesn't come anywhere near meeting the hype rest assured there will be absolutely no repercussions. And space, reducing that regulation has the prospect of having significantly worse ramifications. Google Kessler Syndrome or just go watch the movie Gravity. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cjdl22yrrk2o Of course this is just the tip of the iceberg - veterans, trans people, and so on - but I'm frustrated and that's all I've got for now.
item.dc:creator: divjnky

item.title: Hexia - Cosplay
item.description:
Here's another look at my Hexia cosplay from Halloween! It was such a blast portraying the beautiful character that @miaormoa has created, that makes Imgur what it is :D I really need to do more Imgurian creation cosplays... Let me know who I should be inspired by next! I love hearing ideas.
Reference image of Hexia :D (originally posted by @Alsoashley on 2023-11-09 16:26:42)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Some things never change.
item.description: Source: https://www.independent.co.uk/news/world/americas/crime/maga-evangelical-jason-yates-charges-b2642048.html Fox puppets laying out how to steal an election before actively commanding it: https://imgur.com/gallery/sQzDOlI Pardons for criminals, by criminals: https://www.justice.gov/pardon/pardons-granted-president-donald-j-trump-2017-2021 Brought to you by: "The best people" https://imgur.com/gallery/5k3JHlE https://imgur.com/gallery/9zDDKFT (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/LPyUdYF (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/7wxyNys (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/taJZoC7 (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/VdkqbFS (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/YlAGDFN (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/8GHlxoG (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/8VGDY8w (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/hYduSMS (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/3uhtTUq (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/JJzITny (continued) FULL LIST: https://www.dailykos.com/history/user/CajsaLilliehook Don't forget Gweggy! https://imgur.com/gallery/ddZqpFD More from Texas: https://imgur.com/gallery/NNRExX2 Also in Texas: https://imgur.com/gallery/prqm2cq Also in Texas (update provided by: UnknownParticipant67): https://www.chron.com/neighborhood/moco/news/article/texas-right-to-life-luke-bowen-prison-solicit-teen-17788511.php
item.dc:creator: BlasphemousJones

item.title: Monsters are human, too
item.description: We are so proud that our main source of income is our readers. They support us through Patreon and get various benefits. For example the monthly LOVE LETTER that contains an exclusive product, a poem and a hologram sticker. Go to https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas for more
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: Fallout Friday: n1mph cosplay
item.description:
Cosplay: Lucy MacClean
Reference image I love this picture, I have a t-shirt, a hoodie, and a throw pillow with this image, lol.
Cosplay: Sole Survivor No credits were given for the dog unfortunately.
Been meaning to play more of this series, but it's kinda bleak, maybe I should play something more upbeat.
item.dc:creator: MermaidNinja

item.title: current mood
item.description: Any dolt with half a brain Can see that human-kind has gone insane To the point where I don't know If I'll upset the status quo If I throw poison in the water main. Listen close to everybody's heart And hear that breaking sound. Hopes and dreams are shattering apart And crashing to the ground. I cannot believe my eyes How the world's filled with filth and lies But it's plain to see Evil inside of me Is on the rise. -Doctor Horrible's Sing-Along-Blog, Act 2, "My Eyes" Full song: https://youtu.be/r7e8oZo9Jfw Full film: https://youtu.be/Of9kHpCv1ts
item.dc:creator: thetonestarr

item.title: fuck people who do this for no reason; at least there’s instant justice
item.dc:creator: GravityVT

item.title: It's actually what qualifies him as a church leader.
item.description: I don't even know what to do anymore. It's hard to plan for or invest in the future when you're staring down the barrel of facism. Also difficult to emigrate with pets, let alone to someplace that isn't dealing with the same or even more uncertain problems. Edit for mood music: https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=uRMl0kVUDTE&si=VY3CEYfasyFk00M8
item.dc:creator: cannibalthemusical
